elements.title: Atlas of the Historical Geography of the Holy Land
elements.contents: ... that a map (pictured) from the Atlas of the Historical Geography of the Holy Land was used to negotiate the borders of Mandatory Palestine?

elements.title: Blown Away
elements.contents: ... that the 1994 game Blown Away, inspired by an action movie and themed around bomb disposal, surprised many reviewers by focusing on puzzle gameplay?

elements.title: Scott Kupor
elements.contents: ... that Scott Kupor had not heard of the United States Office of Personnel Management until he was suggested to lead it?

elements.title: Rebrickable
elements.contents: ... that users on Rebrickable create their own Lego designs and sell instructions for them?

elements.title: Prince Sunhwa
elements.contents: ... that, according to his obituary, Prince Sunhwa "killed more than ten people each year"?

elements.title: Time After Time
elements.contents: ... that "Time After Time" uses the turn signal sound of the Volvo XC60 as a musical element?

elements.title: Burton Miller
elements.contents: ... that Academy Award nominee Burton Miller was the first costume designer elected to the governing board of the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences?

elements.title: born secret
elements.contents: ... that U.S. law states that information on atomic weapons is born secret from the moment of creation?

elements.title: Bartley station
elements.contents: ... that The Coin Mat in Bartley station is made of 164,800 one-cent coins?
